title: Geologic Expansion
description: adds new features to expand on the overworld and the geological aspects of the game.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/648382392230215702?color=ab4d18&label=%20&labelColor=8a3d12&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/fTzK9SP) [![](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=ItsBlackGear&color=ab4d18&labelColor=8a3d12&style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=DDE4EF)](https://twitter.com/ItsBlackGear) [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?label=&color=ab4d18&labelColor=8a3d12&style=for-the-badge&logo=Patreon&logoColor=white&url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api/?username=blackgear&type=patrons)](https://patreon.com/blackgear)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
# 🌲 Discover new horizons. Geologic Expansion adds new features to expand on the **overworld** and the **geological** aspects of the game. ## Features: - **Prismatic Caldera**: A new thermal biome inspired on the Yellowstone's Caldera. - **Prismatic Stone**: New stone type that can be dyed and polished! Enhance your builds with new colorful stairs, slabs and walls. - **Geysers**: This new block cycles through different stages overtime, causing large eruptions to ocurr! can also be activated manually by powering it with redstone. - **Limestone**: New stone type that can be found underground, commonly found above deepslate. - **Overgrowth**: This new vegetation block can be used to add age into buildings, commonly found in areas with podzol and mossy cobblestone. - **Ducks**: Friendly little creatures that love swimming and fishing! you can trade their findings with seeds, commonly found in swamps, meadows, rivers, taiga and prismatic caldera biomes. Most features can be toggled so if there's something that you wouldn't like in the game you can turn it off in the config.
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
